scope: tracked repository-owned docs/** and README.md paths; deleted pre-move paths excluded and retained successors included

classification.completedLedgers: 12 sibling *.tasks.json ledgers contain only completed tasks and are inventoried by docs/product-specs/index.md
classification.rootReadmePolicy: Product purpose, stable repo shape, routes, and local commands only; mutable provider/deployment proof removed.

postcondition: All retained paths contribute to deterministic digests; completed plans/ledgers and research remain reachable outside default current context; no historical content was deleted.
limitations: Path counts do not prove semantic correctness.
App/package README runbook and proof extraction continues in later HGI-300 slices.
nonClaims: No Vercel, Executor, Sendblue, Upstash, AI Gateway, deployment, webhook, credential, release, production, or external-consumer state is proved.
